В   "We Called It" is aВ Clay and Buck "See, I Told You So."В  В A major segment of the hour is dedicated to the explosive revelations from an upcoming book by Jake Tapper and Alex Thompson, which alleges that President BidenвҖҷs physical and cognitive decline was so severe that aides considered he might need a wheelchair post-election. Clay and Buck argue that legacy media outlets like CNN and NBC knowingly misled the public about BidenвҖҷs condition to protect his candidacy and defeat Trump. They assert that this media cover-up is part of a broader pattern of misinformation, comparing it to the mediaвҖҷs handling of COVID-19 and the Russia collusion narrative. They play a montage of past clips from CNNвҖҷs Jake Tapper, illustrating what they describe as a stark contrast between his previous defenses of Biden and his current reporting. They speculate on the strategic missteps that led to Biden participating in the June 27th debate, which they believe was a turning point in the election cycle. TrumpвҖҷs speech emphasized peace, innovation, and a firm stance against a nuclear-armed Iran, reinforcing his administrationвҖҷs commitment to global stability and economic diplomacy.  В   South African Refugees  В   A discussion centered on immigration, race politics, and media hypocrisy, with a spotlight on the controversy surrounding President Donald TrumpвҖҷs decision to welcome approximately 50 white South African migrants into the United States.
